utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Chandler ! It happens to lots of guys ! You ... you ... you were probably tired , you had a lot of champagne , do not worry about it !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am not worried , I am uh , I am fascinated .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know it is like uh , Biology !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Which is funny because in high school I uh , I ... I failed Biology and tonight Biology failed me .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Check it out . Okay , I can play this when the guests are coming in . Okay .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I can play this when the guests are coming in .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: If you would have let me finish , it goes on to say that he is probably not gay .
